note: Generated by scripts/scrape_sts2_wiki_builds.py; re-run to refresh.

builds.title: Necrobinder Osty Build
builds.description: Turn Osty into an unstoppable force. Stack Summon effects to build Osty's HP, then unleash devastating attacks through Reanimate or sacrifice for massive AoE. Osty acts as both your shield and your weapon.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Dirge
card_acquisition_priority.note: Premium Summon card. Large HP boost to Osty with additional effects.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Borrowed Time
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain Energy per Summon. Turns Summon-heavy turns into explosive Energy generation.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Reanimate
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deal damage equal to Osty's HP. Your primary win condition — 50 HP Osty = 50 damage hit.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Invoke
card_acquisition_priority.note: Summon + Soul generation. Core engine card for both Osty and Soul resources.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Grave Warden
card_acquisition_priority.note: Block + Soul generation. The best common card for Necrobinder — take every copy.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Wisp
card_acquisition_priority.note: Cheap Summon source. Low cost means you can play multiple Summons per turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Pull Aggro
card_acquisition_priority.note: Force all enemies to target Osty. Protects the Necrobinder when Osty has high HP.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Sentry Mode
card_acquisition_priority.note: Osty attacks automatically. Turns Osty into an offensive weapon alongside being a shield.

best.name: Bound Phylactery
best.note: Necrobinder's starter relic. Ensures Osty persists and is resummoned automatically.

best.name: Bag of Preparation
best.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. Find Summon cards faster to build Osty early.

best.name: Anchor
best.note: Start with 10 Block. Extra protection while Osty is still small.

good.name: Mummified Hand
good.note: Powers cost 0 after playing a Power. Borrowed Time and Sentry Mode benefit greatly.

good.name: Meat on the Bone
good.note: Heal 12 HP when below 50% after combat. Necrobinder has the lowest HP at 66.

good.name: Vajra
good.note: +1 Strength buffs Reanimate and all attack damage.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain +1 Strength. Necrobinder's low HP (66) can't afford enemies hitting harder.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Gold is crucial for purchasing Rare Summon cards and relics from shops.

avoid.name: Runic Dome
avoid.note: Knowing enemy intent matters — you need to decide when Osty blocks vs when to Reanimate.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Bound Phylactery
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of your turn, Summon 1.

builds.title: Necrobinder Soul Build
builds.description: A card-draw powerhouse that generates Souls (free 0-cost draw-2 Exhaust cards) and converts them into devastating damage via Soul Storm, Haunt, and Death March. By flooding the deck with Souls and playing them for massive draw, every turn becomes an explosive chain of card plays that overwhelm enemies with unstoppable accumulated damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Haunt
card_acquisition_priority.note: 6 damage to random enemy per Soul played. Multiple copies stack. 2 Haunts = 12 free damage per Soul. The #1 payoff card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capture Spirit
card_acquisition_priority.note: 1 Energy for 3 Souls. The most efficient Soul generator. Take every copy offered.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Soul Storm
card_acquisition_priority.note: Scaling finisher. +2 damage per Soul in exhaust pile. By mid-fight, easily deals 30-50+ damage per play.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Death March
card_acquisition_priority.note: 8 damage +3 per card drawn this turn. With Souls drawing 2 each, this hits for 30-50+ damage reliably.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Grave Warden
card_acquisition_priority.note: 8 Block + 1 Soul for 1 Energy. Replaces Defend while feeding the Soul engine. Essential early pickup.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Dirge
card_acquisition_priority.note: X-cost: generates X Souls + X Summon for Osty. Excellent setup card that also strengthens your tank.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Devour Life
card_acquisition_priority.note: Summon 1 whenever you play a Soul. Turns every Soul into Osty growth, making Osty an invincible wall.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Borrowed Time
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply 3 Doom to yourself, gain 1 Energy. The Doom is nearly irrelevant when enemies die fast. Free Energy is excellent.

best.name: Funerary Mask
best.note: Start every combat with 3 free Souls in draw pile. Accelerates the engine by an entire turn.

best.name: Pendulum
best.note: Draw a card on every shuffle. The deck churns through cards so fast that this triggers 3-5+ times per combat.

best.name: Letter Opener
best.note: Deal 5 AoE damage every 3 Skills played. All Souls count as Skills — triggers constantly.

good.name: Dolly S Mirror
good.note: Copy any card. Duplicating Haunt or Capture Spirit dramatically increases the deck's power.

good.name: Chemical X
good.note: X-cost cards like Dirge gain +2 effect. 2 extra Souls and Summon per Dirge play.

good.name: Razor Tooth
good.note: Upgrade every Attack and Skill played in combat. Souls count as Skills, and payoff cards upgrade to deal more damage.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: 6 card limit destroys this deck. Playing Souls alone can require 6+ card plays per turn.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses clog the draw pile and interfere with Soul draw timing.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomizing costs breaks the Energy management. Souls are 0-cost by design; other cards have specific costs.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Funerary Mask
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, add 3 Souls into your Draw Pile.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Pendulum
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, draw a card.

builds.title: Necrobinder Doom Build
builds.description: Apply Doom to enemies until it exceeds their HP, causing instant death. Bypasses all defenses, armor, and scaling. When Doom stacks equal or exceed enemy HP, they die at the end of their next turn. The ultimate inevitability.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capture Spirit
card_acquisition_priority.note: Apply Doom + generate Souls. The core Doom card that does everything the build needs.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Countdown
card_acquisition_priority.note: Power that applies Doom passively each turn. Set-and-forget Doom generation.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Danse Macabre
card_acquisition_priority.note: Every Soul generated applies 1 Doom to all enemies. Turns Soul engine into Doom engine.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Grave Warden
card_acquisition_priority.note: Best common card. Block + Souls. The backbone of both defense and Soul generation.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Reave
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deal damage + generate Souls. Efficient Soul generation that also provides immediate offense.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Bodyguard
card_acquisition_priority.note: Starting deck Summon. Keeps Osty alive to tank while you stack Doom.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defile
card_acquisition_priority.note: Attack that applies Doom. Decent early-game Doom source with damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defy
card_acquisition_priority.note: Block card that synergizes with the Necrobinder's mechanics. Solid defense.

best.name: Bound Phylactery
best.note: Necrobinder's starter relic. Osty absorbs damage while you focus on applying Doom.

best.name: Bag of Preparation
best.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. Find Doom applicators and Soul generators quickly.

best.name: Anchor
best.note: Start with 10 Block. Critical at 66 HP — buys time for Doom to accumulate.

good.name: Mummified Hand
good.note: Powers cost 0 after playing a Power. Countdown and Danse Macabre set up faster.

good.name: Tungsten Rod
good.note: Reduce HP loss by 1. Every point matters at 66 base HP.

good.name: Meat on the Bone
good.note: Heal 12 HP when below 50%. Essential survival for the Necrobinder's low HP pool.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain +1 Strength. At 66 HP, you can't afford enemies hitting harder while waiting for Doom.

avoid.name: Mark Of Pain
avoid.note: Wounds in draw pile dilute the deck. Harder to find Doom applicators and Soul generators.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses dilute the deck just like Wounds. Doom build needs consistency above all.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Bound Phylactery
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of your turn, Summon 1.

builds.title: Necrobinder Reaper Build
builds.description: Transform into the Reaper and harvest enemies with devastating attack scaling. Reaper Form empowers your attacks with lifesteal and bonus damage, while The Scythe and Eradicate provide massive AoE. Unlike Soul or Doom builds, this is pure aggression — attack hard, heal through damage, and overwhelm enemies before they can respond.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Reaper Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: Lifesteal + bonus attack damage. The entire build's engine. Makes every attack heal you.

card_acquisition_priority.name: The Scythe
card_acquisition_priority.note: Massive AoE damage. With Reaper Form lifesteal, it heals for each enemy hit.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Eradicate
card_acquisition_priority.note: Heavy single-target removal. With Strength from Lethality, one-shots most enemies.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Lethality
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain Strength to amplify all attacks. The Scythe AoE with Strength is devastating.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Flatten
card_acquisition_priority.note: Damage + Summon for Osty. Keeps your tank alive while dealing damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Death March
card_acquisition_priority.note: Scaling damage per card drawn. Souls from Grave Warden boost this naturally.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Grave Warden
card_acquisition_priority.note: 8 Block + 1 Soul. Defense and supplementary draw for the attack-heavy build.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Necro Mastery
card_acquisition_priority.note: Enhances all attacks. Late-game power multiplier for The Scythe and Eradicate.

best.name: Bone Flute
best.note: Necrobinder's starter relic. Enhances Osty interaction, providing better tanking while you set up Reaper Form.

best.name: Shuriken
best.note: Gain 1 Strength every 3 Attacks. Amplifies The Scythe and Eradicate damage further.

best.name: Vajra
best.note: +1 Strength at combat start. Every point of Strength is multiplied across The Scythe's AoE hits.

good.name: Meat on the Bone
good.note: Heal 12 HP if below 50% at end of combat. Insurance alongside Reaper Form's lifesteal.

good.name: Pen Nib
good.note: Every 10th Attack deals double damage. Time with Eradicate for massive burst.

good.name: Akabeko
good.note: First Attack each combat deals +8 damage. Strong opener when combined with Lethality.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: +1 Strength to enemies while you spend turns setting up Reaper Form. Too dangerous.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Attack-heavy turns with Souls for draw may exceed 6 plays.

avoid.name: Runic Dome
avoid.note: Need to know when to set up vs when to block. Reaper Form setup turns are vulnerable.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Shuriken
key_relics_sidebar.note: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.
